title: alchemilla vulgaris var. multidens
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. multidens, also known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating skin irritations. The herbal preparations of alchemilla vulgaris var. multidens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
